message:
fix: Clean up unused imports and improve code quality

- Removed unused imports across multiple files
- Fixed admin appeals page import
- Cleaned up API routes: appeals, referral code
- Improved referral page component
- Fixed roadmap page and feature submit form imports
- Cleaned up user page component
- Enhanced onboarding: FirstVisitWelcome, OnboardingTooltip
- Fixed referral share modal imports
- Cleaned up roadmap store
- Fixed bundle budget test imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
